# 📋 APPENDIX A: Regulatory Compliance Mapping
## Carte de Conformité Réglementaire / خريطة الامتثال التنظيمي
**Al-Madrasa Al-Shamila — Version 2.1 (Inspection-Grade)**

> **Document de référence pour inspections MENPS/AREF • وثيقة مرجعية لتفتيش الوزارة/الأكاديميات**
> *Last Updated: February 2026 | Confidential — For Regulatory Review*

---

## 1. Executive Compliance Statement
### Déclaration Exécutive de Conformité / البيان التنفيذي للامتثال

```
FRENCH:
L'École Al-Madrasa Al-Shamila s'engage à délivrer 100% du programme officiel 
du Ministère de l'Éducation Nationale, du Préscolaire et des Sports (MENPS) 
pour les niveaux Collège et Lycée, conformément aux dispositions de la Loi 51.17 
et aux circulaires d'application en vigueur. 

Toute différenciation pédagogique intervient exclusivement :
• Dans les méthodes d'enseignement (pédagogie structurée, intégration de valeurs)
• Dans les créneaux non obligatoires (vendredi après-midi, activités périscolaires)
• Dans l'accompagnement complémentaire (portfolios, projets, enrichissement)

Aucune substitution de contenu officiel n'est pratiquée.

ARABIC:
تلتزم مدرسة المدرسة الشاملة بتدريس 100% من المنهاج الرسمي لوزارة التربية الوطنية 
والتعليم الأولي والرياضة لمستويات الإعدادي والثانوي، وفقاً لأحكام القانون 51.17 
والمناشير التطبيقية السارية.

يتم أي تميز بيداغوجي حصراً من خلال:
• طرق التدريس (بيداغوجيا منظمة، دمج القيم)
• الفترات غير الإلزامية (بعد ظهر الجمعة، الأنشطة اللاصفية)
• الدعم التكميلي (ملفات الإنجاز، المشاريع، الإثراء)

لا يتم أي استبدال للمحتوى الرسمي.
```

---

## 2. Regulatory Reference Framework
### Cadre Réglementaire de Référence / الإطار التنظيمي المرجعي

| Reference / Référence | Title / Intitulé | Relevance to Shamila / Pertinence pour Shamila | Compliance Action / Action de conformité |
|---------------------|-----------------|----------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| **Loi 51.17** (2019) | Loi-cadre relative au système d'éducation, de formation et de recherche scientifique | Defines private school licensing, curriculum obligations, inspection authority | Full curriculum delivery; AREF registration; annual inspection readiness |
| **Draft Law 59.21** (2025) | Projet de loi relatif aux établissements d'enseignement privé (en cours d'adoption) | Proposed social quotas, fee transparency, contract requirements | Implement 15% free places target; written contracts; fee publication; monitor final text |
| **Circulaire MENPS 2025-09** | Mesures de régulation des frais de scolarité et contrats avec les familles | Mandatory written contracts; ban on mid-year fee increases; transparency | Standardized family contracts; published fee schedule; no mid-year modifications |
| **Arrêté ministériel (streams)** | Organisation des filières du Baccalauréat marocain | Defines Tronc Commun + specialization streams (Sciences, Lettres, Éco-Gestion) | Deliver all mandated subjects per stream; official timetables; Bac-format assessments |
| **AREF Guidelines** | Directives régionales pour l'agrément et le suivi des établissements privés | Regional inspection protocols; teacher qualification requirements; facility standards | Compliance Officer role; teacher file audits; facility safety documentation |
| **PSP Framework** (2023) | Programme Écoles Pionnières — structured pedagogy + TaRL remediation | Evidence-based teaching methods compatible with Ministry priorities | Integrate PSP-inspired structured lessons for core literacy/numeracy; document alignment |

> **Note de veille réglementaire / ملاحظة الرصد التنظيمي**: 
> *La conformité est révisée trimestriellement par le Responsable Conformité. Toute évolution législative (notamment Loi 59.21) fait l'objet d'une analyse d'impact sous 15 jours.*
> *الامتثال يُراجع فصلياً من قبل مسؤول الامتثال. أي تطور تشريعي (خاصة القانون 59.21) يخضع لتحليل الأثر خلال 15 يوماً.*

---

## 3. Subject Delivery Mapping: Collège (Grades 7-9)
### Cartographie de Livraison des Matières : Collège / خريطة تدريس المواد: الإعدادي

| Official Subject / Matière Officielle | Ministry Requirements / Exigences MENPS | Shamila Delivery Method / Méthode de livraison Shamila | Enrichment Layer / Couche d'enrichissement | Evidence Type / Type de preuve | Responsible / Responsable | Audit Frequency / Fréquence d'audit |
|-------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| **Langue Arabe** (6h/sem) | Programmes officiels; manuels approuvés; préparation Bac | Structured lessons (PSP-inspired); certified Arabic specialist; official textbooks | Quranic reflection starter (5 min); rhetorical analysis extension; debate club (after-school) | Lesson plans; attendance; mock exams; club logs | Arabic Dept. Head + Compliance Officer | Monthly lesson review; termly inspection pack |
| **Instruction Islamique** (2h/sem) | Programmes officiels; focus on values, citizenship | Official curriculum delivered by qualified teacher; Ministry-approved resources | Values integration across subjects; ethical dilemma discussions; service-learning projects | Curriculum maps; teacher qualifications; project documentation | Islamic Education Lead + Values Coordinator | Quarterly values integration audit |
| **Disciplines Sociales** (3h/sem) | History, Geography, Civics per national programs | Official content + critical questioning framework; primary source analysis | Community mapping projects; local history documentation; civic engagement clubs | Student projects; source analysis worksheets; club participation records | Social Studies Lead + Community Engagement | Termly project review |
| **Français** (6h/sem) | Language of instruction for sciences; official programs | Structured pedagogy; French specialist; scientific communication focus | Francophone media analysis; writing workshops; debate team (after-school) | Lesson plans; writing portfolios; competition participation | French Dept. Head + Literacy Coordinator | Monthly writing portfolio review |
| **Mathématiques** (6h/sem) | Official programs; problem-solving; Bac preparation | PSP-inspired structured lessons; Math specialist; regular formative assessments | Real-world application projects (budgeting, data analysis); math club; enterprise support | Assessment records; project rubrics; club logs | Math Dept. Head + Data Coordinator | Bi-weekly assessment review |
| **Sciences Naturelles** (2h/sem) | Official programs; lab work; environmental education | Official curriculum + inquiry-based labs; safety protocols | Environmental monitoring projects; health awareness campaigns; science fair | Lab reports; project documentation; safety logs | Science Coordinator + Lab Manager | Termly lab safety audit |
| **Sciences Physiques** (2h/sem) | Official programs; experimental approach | Structured lessons; equipment per Ministry standards | Renewable energy projects; physics applications club; innovation challenges | Experiment records; project outputs; equipment logs | Physics Specialist + Innovation Lead | Termly equipment + project audit |
| **Éducation Physique** (3h/sem) | Official programs; health, teamwork, sportsmanship | Ministry curriculum; certified PE teacher; inclusive activities | Wellness workshops; sports leadership training; inter-house competitions | Attendance; fitness assessments; competition records | PE Coordinator + Wellness Lead | Termly wellness review |
| **Éducation Plastique** (1h/sem) | Official programs; creativity, cultural expression | Official curriculum + values-integrated projects | Digital arts club; cultural heritage documentation; community art projects | Student portfolios; exhibition records; project documentation | Arts Coordinator + Cultural Lead | Annual portfolio showcase |
| **Initiation à la Technologie** (2h/sem) | Basic digital literacy; ICT skills per Ministry | Official ICT curriculum; offline-first tools; digital citizenship | AI literacy modules (opt-in); coding club; tech-for-good projects | Lesson plans; student work; club participation | Tech Coordinator + AI Ethics Lead | Termly digital citizenship review |

> **Timetable Conformity Note / Note de conformité emploi du temps**:
> *All core subjects delivered within Ministry-mandated weekly hours. Enrichment activities scheduled exclusively in Friday PM blocks (14:30-16:00) or after-school (16:00-18:00), with separate attendance tracking and no interference with core instruction.*
> *جميع المواد الأساسية تُدرّس ضمن الساعات الأسبوعية الإلزامية حسب الوزارة. أنشطة الإثراء تُجدول حصراً في فترات بعد ظهر الجمعة (14:30-16:00) أو بعد الدوام (16:00-18:00)، مع تتبع حضور منفصل وبدون تداخل مع التدريس الأساسي.*

---

## 4. Subject Delivery Mapping: Lycée Streams (Grades 10-12)
### Cartographie par Filière Lycée / الخريطة حسب شعب الثانوي

#### 4.1 Tronc Commun (Year 10) — All Streams
| Official Subject | Ministry Requirements | Shamila Delivery | Enrichment Layer | Evidence | Responsible | Audit |
|-----------------|---------------------|-----------------|-----------------|----------|-------------|-------|
| **Arabe** (4h) | Official program; literary analysis; Bac prep | Structured lessons; specialist teacher; mock exams | Rhetorical analysis extension; media literacy club | Lesson plans; exam records; club logs | Arabic Lead | Monthly |
| **Français** (4h) | Scientific communication; Bac prep | Content-language integration; specialist | Writing workshops; debate team; Francophone culture club | Writing portfolios; competition records | French Lead | Monthly |
| **Anglais** (3h) | Optional enrichment; communication skills | Task-based learning; TOEFL/IELTS prep (opt-in) | AI literacy modules; global citizenship projects | Participation logs; portfolio artifacts | English Coordinator | Termly |
| **Mathématiques** (5h) | Official program; problem-solving | PSP-inspired structured pedagogy; regular assessments | Real-world applications; math club; enterprise support | Assessment records; project rubrics | Math Lead | Bi-weekly |
| **Physique-Chimie** (3h) | Official program; lab work | Inquiry-based labs; safety protocols | Renewable energy projects; innovation challenges | Lab reports; project documentation | Science Coordinator | Termly |
| **SVT** (2h) | Official program; environmental focus | Official curriculum + community applications | Environmental monitoring; health campaigns | Project records; safety logs | Biology Specialist | Termly |
| **Histoire-Géographie** (2h) | Official program; critical analysis | Primary source analysis; critical questioning | Community mapping; local history projects | Student projects; source worksheets | Social Studies Lead | Termly |
| **Éducation Islamique** (2h) | Official values/citizenship curriculum | Qualified teacher; Ministry resources | Values integration across subjects; service-learning | Curriculum maps; project documentation | Islamic Ed Lead | Quarterly |
| **Philosophie** (2h) | Introduced in Lycée; critical reasoning | Socratic seminars; ethical frameworks | Ethics bowl; AI ethics discussions | Seminar records; reflection journals | Philosophy Lead | Termly |
| **EPS** (2h) | Official program; health/teamwork | Certified teacher; inclusive activities | Wellness workshops; sports leadership | Attendance; fitness assessments | PE Coordinator | Termly |

#### 4.2 Specialization Streams (Years 11-12) — Example: Sciences Expérimentales
| Stream-Specific Subject | Ministry Requirements | Shamila Delivery | Enrichment Layer | Evidence | Responsible |
|------------------------|---------------------|-----------------|-----------------|----------|-------------|
| **Mathématiques Avancées** (6h) | Advanced calculus; Bac exam prep | Specialist teacher; structured problem sets | Mathematical modeling projects; research mentorship | Problem sets; project rubrics; mentorship logs | Math Specialist |
| **Physique-Chimie Avancée** (5h) | Advanced topics; lab-intensive | Inquiry labs; safety protocols; Bac prep | Research projects; innovation challenges; industry partnerships | Lab reports; project documentation; partnership MOUs | Science Coordinator |
| **SVT Avancée** (4h) | Advanced biology; environmental focus | Official curriculum + community applications | Public health projects; environmental monitoring | Project records; community impact reports | Biology Specialist |
| **Français Scientifique** (2h) | Technical communication; scientific writing | Content-language integration; writing workshops | Research abstract writing; conference presentation prep | Writing portfolios; presentation records | French Lead + Science Coordinator |

> **Stream Conformity Note**: *Each specialization stream delivers 100% of Ministry-mandated content and hours. Enrichment activities are additive, scheduled in non-core time, and documented separately.*

---

## 5. Assessment & Baccalauréat Preparation Protocol
### Protocole d'Évaluation et Préparation au Bac / بروتوكول التقييم والتحضير للباكالوريا

| Component | Ministry Requirement | Shamila Implementation | Evidence Archive | Responsible |
|-----------|---------------------|----------------------|-----------------|-------------|
| **Formative Assessment** | Regular evaluation per subject | Weekly quizzes; exit tickets; PSP-inspired checks | Digital gradebook; paper backups; termly reports | Subject Teachers + Academic Dean |
| **Mock Exams (Régional/National)** | Preparation for official Bac format | Quarterly mock exams using official rubrics; timed conditions | Exam papers; grading rubrics; student answer archives; analysis reports | Exam Coordinator + Compliance Officer |
| **Bac Registration & Logistics** | Official registration through AREF | Full administrative support; deadline tracking; candidate preparation | Registration confirmations; candidate lists; logistics checklists | Administrative Director + Compliance Officer |
| **Remediation (TaRL-inspired)** | Support for struggling students | Diagnostic assessments; flexible grouping; targeted interventions | Diagnostic records; intervention plans; progress tracking | Academic Dean + Subject Specialists |
| **Portfolio Documentation** (Supplementary) | Not required for Bac; optional for international | Student-curated portfolios for enrichment projects; values integration | Digital portfolios; rubric scores; reflection journals | Student Life Dean + Portfolio Coordinator |

> **Critical Compliance Boundary / Limite de conformité critique**:
> *Portfolios and enrichment assessments are NEVER used for official Bac grading or Ministry reporting. They are strictly supplementary for student development, international applications, or internal quality improvement.*
> *ملفات الإنجاز وتقييمات الإثراء لا تُستخدم أبداً في تقدير الباكالوريا الرسمي أو التقارير الوزارية. هي تكميلية حصراً لتطوير الطالب أو الطلبات الدولية أو تحسين الجودة الداخلي.*

---

## 6. Teacher Qualification & Compliance Matrix
### Matrice des Qualifications Enseignantes / مصفوفة مؤهلات الأساتذة

| Role | Ministry Minimum Requirement | Shamila Enhanced Standard | Verification Method | Audit Frequency |
|------|----------------------------|-------------------------|-------------------|----------------|
| **Subject Teacher (Core)** | Bachelor's + teaching certification (CRMEF or equivalent) | Bachelor's + certification + bilingual proficiency (Ar/Fr) + values alignment screening | Diploma copies; certification verification; interview records; reference checks | Annual file review; pre-hire verification |
| **Specialist Teacher (Math/Ar/Fr)** | Subject expertise + certification | Above + PSP training + structured pedagogy certification + enrichment facilitation skills | Training certificates; lesson observation records; student outcome data | Termly observation; annual competency review |
| **Islamic Education Teacher** | Qualified in Islamic studies + teaching certification | Above + Quranic pedagogy training + interfaith dialogue facilitation | Qualification verification; pedagogy training records; community feedback | Annual review; parent feedback cycle |
| **Enrichment Facilitator** (Clubs/Projects) | No specific Ministry requirement for after-school | Subject expertise OR professional experience + safeguarding training + child protection certification | Background checks; training records; project documentation | Pre-activity verification; termly review |
| **Compliance + QA Officer** | Not mandated by Ministry | Legal/regulatory knowledge + education quality assurance + risk management training | Professional credentials; training records; audit logs | Quarterly performance review; external audit annually |

> **Teacher File Structure / Structure du dossier enseignant**:
> ```
> /TeacherFiles/[LastName]_[FirstName]/
> ├── 01_Qualifications/ (diplomas, certifications, IDs)
> ├── 02_Training/ (PSP, values integration, safeguarding records)
> ├── 03_LessonPlans/ (termly submissions; compliance-checked)
> ├── 04_Assessments/ (mock exams; grading records; student progress)
> ├── 05_Observations/ (classroom observations; feedback; improvement plans)
> └── 06_Compliance/ (contract; code of conduct; annual attestations)
> ```

---

## 7. Administrative Compliance: Contracts, Fees, Scholarships
### Conformité Administrative: Contrats, Frais, Bourses / الامتثال الإداري: العقود، الرسوم، المنح

| Requirement | Ministry/Regulatory Basis | Shamila Implementation | Evidence Type | Responsible |
|-------------|--------------------------|----------------------|--------------|-------------|
| **Written Family Contracts** | Circulaire MENPS 2025-09; Draft Law 59.21 | Standardized trilingual contract (Ar/Fr/En); clear fee schedule; no mid-year modifications; signature + copy to family | Signed contracts archive; fee schedule publication; amendment log (if any) | Administrative Director + Compliance Officer |
| **Fee Transparency** | Same as above | Published fee schedule on website + physical display; itemized breakdown; scholarship policy clearly stated | Website screenshots; physical display photos; scholarship policy document | Marketing Lead + Compliance Officer |
| **Scholarship Process (15% target)** | Draft Law 59.21 (proposed social quota) | Transparent application form; income verification; selection committee (Director + Community Rep + Academic Lead); annual review | Application forms; verification documents; committee minutes; selection records; retention tracking | Scholarship Coordinator + Compliance Officer |
| **No Mid-Year Fee Increases** | Circulaire 2025-09 | Fee schedule locked at enrollment; any exceptional changes require Ministry approval + 30-day family notice | Fee change log (empty if compliant); Ministry approval records (if applicable) | Finance Director + Compliance Officer |
| **Re-enrollment Policy** | Standard private school regulation | Clear timeline; academic standing criteria; scholarship renewal process; written communication to families | Policy document; communication templates; re-enrollment records | Academic Dean + Administrative Director |

> **Scholarship Process Flow / Processus de sélection des bourses**:
> ```
> 1. Application (Jan-Feb): Family submits form + income documentation
> 2. Verification (Mar): Administrative review + community reference check
> 3. Committee Review (Apr): Selection committee evaluates academic potential + need
> 4. Notification (May): Written decision to families; appeal process if declined
> 5. Annual Review (Jun): Progress check; renewal criteria communicated
> 6. Archive: All documents stored securely; data protection compliant
> ```

---

## 8. Enrichment Track Governance (Clearly Demarcated)
### Gouvernance de la Piste Enrichissement / حوكمة مسار الإثراء

| Component | Governance Principle | Implementation | Compliance Boundary | Evidence |
|-----------|---------------------|----------------|-------------------|----------|
| **Friday Project Blocks** (14:30-16:00) | Voluntary participation; no interference with core curriculum | Student choice of 3-5 project options; separate attendance; qualified facilitators; clear learning objectives | Never scheduled during Ministry-mandated hours; never replaces core subject instruction | Attendance logs; project plans; facilitator qualifications; parent consent forms |
| **After-School Clubs** (16:00-18:00) | Optional enrichment; safeguarding protocols | Club charters; trained facilitators; parent communication; safety procedures | No academic credit toward Bac; separate budget tracking; opt-in participation | Club charters; facilitator training records; incident logs (if any); parent communications |
| **Portfolio Documentation** | Supplementary only; student-curated | Digital platform; rubric-based assessment; reflection prompts; optional sharing | Never used for official grading; clear disclaimer on purpose; data protection compliance | Portfolio guidelines; rubric templates; student consent forms; data protection policy |
| **Values Integration Protocol** | Embedded in pedagogy, not added content | 5-minute structured reflection starter; teacher training; lesson plan template | Never extends core lesson time; never substitutes mandated content; documented as methodology | Lesson plan templates; teacher training records; classroom observation notes |

> **Critical Boundary Statement / Déclaration de limite critique**:
> *"All enrichment activities are explicitly labeled as optional, supplementary, and non-credit-bearing for the Moroccan Baccalauréat. No student is required to participate, and no enrichment activity replaces mandated instructional time or content."*
> *"جميع أنشطة الإثراء مُصنفة صراحةً كاختيارية وتكميلية وغير محتسبة للباكالوريا المغربية. لا يُطلب من أي طالب المشاركة، ولا تحل أي نشاط إثراء محل الوقت أو المحتوى التعليمي الإلزامي."*

---

## 9. Inspection Readiness Checklist
### Liste de Vérification pour Inspection / قائمة الجاهزية للتفتيش

**Pre-Inspection (48 hours notice typical)**

| Category | Item | Status (✓/✗) | Evidence Location | Responsible |
|----------|------|-------------|------------------|-------------|
| **Licensing** | Current AREF operating license displayed | | /01_Licensing/ | Director |
| **Timetables** | Weekly schedule matches Ministry hour requirements per subject/stream | | /02_Timetables/ | Academic Dean |
| **Curriculum** | Official textbooks/resources available; no unauthorized substitutions | | /03_Curriculum/ | Subject Leads |
| **Assessments** | Mock exam archives; grading rubrics; student progress records | | /03_Assessments/ | Exam Coordinator |
| **Teacher Files** | Complete files for all staff (qualifications, training, contracts) | | /04_TeacherFiles/ | HR + Compliance |
| **Contracts/Fees** | Signed family contracts; published fee schedule; scholarship records | | /05_ContractsFees/ | Admin Director |
| **Scholarships** | Application process documentation; selection committee records | | /06_Scholarships/ | Scholarship Coord. |
| **Safety/Health** | Facility safety certificates; nurse on-call protocol; emergency plans | | /07_SafetyHealth/ | Operations Director |
| **Enrichment** | Club charters; attendance logs; facilitator qualifications (clearly separated) | | /08_ClubsEnrichment/ | Student Life Dean |
| **Compliance Logs** | Quarterly compliance reviews; risk register; corrective action records | | /09_ComplianceLogs/ | Compliance Officer |

**During Inspection Protocol**
- Designated liaison: Compliance Officer + Director
- Evidence access: Pre-organized digital + physical folders
- Staff briefing: All teachers informed of inspection; key contacts identified
- Parent communication: Standard response template for inquiries during inspection

**Post-Inspection Follow-up**
- Formal response to any observations within 15 days
- Corrective action plan with timeline + responsible parties
- Documentation of implemented changes for next inspection cycle

---

## 10. Evidence Archive Structure (Digital + Physical)
### Structure d'Archive des Preuves / هيكل أرشفة الأدلة

```
/AlMadrasa_Compliance_Archive/
│
├── 01_Licensing/
│   ├── AREF_operating_license_2025-2026.pdf
│   ├── Facility_safety_certificates/
│   └── Ministry_correspondence/
│
├── 02_Timetables/
│   ├── Weekly_master_schedule_Collège.pdf
│   ├── Weekly_master_schedule_Lycée_[Stream].pdf
│   ├── Friday_blocks_schedule.pdf (clearly marked "Enrichment - Non-Core")
│   └── After-school_clubs_schedule.pdf (clearly marked "Optional - After Hours")
│
├── 03_Curriculum_Assessments/
│   ├── Subject_Curriculum_Maps/ (per subject, per level)
│   ├── Official_Textbooks_Inventory/
│   ├── Mock_Exam_Archives/ (by term, by subject)
│   ├── Grading_Rubrics_Official/
│   └── Student_Progress_Records/ (anonymized for inspection)
│
├── 04_TeacherFiles/
│   ├── [LastName]_[FirstName]/ (per teacher, per structure in Section 6)
│   └── Staff_Training_Records/ (PSP, values integration, safeguarding)
│
